name: RarStewardAgent — autonomous RAR steward
summary: Autonomous steward of the public RAR: surveys catalog health, clusters same-but-different agents that should be united into one quality base, and flags noise/junk for review. Operator-mediated — suggests, never auto-deletes. Keeps the registry usable as it grows.
tagline: Keep the RAR from rotting into noise — merge the duplicates, prune the junk.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
